Block.Para: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (physical activity and amateur sport fees)

Also available on the Parliament of Canada Web Site at the following address:
http://www.parl.gc.ca

This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to allow the deduction of fees paid by an individual for his or her participation, or the participation of a dependant of the individual, in physical activity or amateur sport.

Bill_Part.RunningHead_E: Income Tax (physical activity and amateur sport fees)

Block.Para: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (physical activity and amateur sport fees)
WHEREAS physical activity and amateur sport are key elements in promoting the physical and mental health of Canadians and need to the encouraged;
WHEREAS the fees for participating in physical activity or amateur sport are often high;
AND WHEREAS tax laws must allow the deduction of those fees in order to lower the tax burden of Canadians;
NOW, THEREFORE, Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:
1. The Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after section 118.95:

Block.MarginalNote: Credit for the cost of participating in physical activity or amateur sport

Para.change: 118.96 (1) For the purpose of computing the tax payable under this Part by an individual for a taxation year, there may be deducted an amount determined by the formula
Ais the appropriate percentage for the year; and
Bis the total of all fees paid by the individual in the year for the individual or a dependant of the individual to participate in physical activity or amateur sport.
(2) The definitions in this subsection apply in this section.

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹amateur sport芒聙聺
脗芦 sport amateur 脗禄

Para.change: 芒聙聹amateur sport芒聙聺 means any sport in which the individual or a dependant of the individual participates without receiving any remuner-ation.

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹dependant芒聙聺
脗芦 personne 脙聽 charge 脗禄

Para.change: 芒聙聹dependant芒聙聺 means a person who in a taxation year is the child, grandchild, niece or nephew of the individual or of the individual芒聙聶s spouse or common-law partner, and who resides with the individual or the individual芒聙聶s spouse or common-law partner in Canada at any time in the year.

Block.MarginalNote:
芒聙聹physical activity芒聙聺
脗芦 activit脙漏 physique 脗禄

Para.change: 芒聙聹physical activity芒聙聺 means any activity that requires the person performing it to develop specific skills and expend energy beyond what is required by the person for basic living functions.

(3) The individual shall file, with the individual芒聙聶s return of income for the year, vouchers setting out the fees paid by the individual for the participation of the individual or a dependant of the individual in physical activity or amateur sport.
(4) The Governor in Council may make regulations prescribing the types of fees that may be deducted under subsection (1).

Block.Para:
Published under authority of the Speaker of the House of Commons
